stream_required: B.Tech / M.Tech (CSE & aligned branches / Biomedical / Cyber security /Project management)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: For B.Tech : Stipend during 10 to 1 Months (Jul’24 –Jun’25) : INR 45,000 per month Salary after 10 to 11 Months of Internship (If PPO Offered) : CTC INR 11,50,000 (70 K - 80 K per month in hand) + 3,00,000 (Joining Bonus) For M.Tech : Stipend during 10 to 11 Months of Internship (Jul’24 –Jun’25) : INR 55,000 per month Salary after 10 to 11 Months of Internship (If PPO Offered) : CTC INR 12,00,000 (85 K - 90 K per month in hand) + 3,00,000 (Joining Bonus
